'''ât-p-n-y''' ('''katapneyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:historicise|historicise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:historicise|historicise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-p-n-y
|-
! Lemma
| katapneyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitapneyoko|thitapneyoko]] || [[word:jitapneyoko|jitapneyoko]] || [[word:shitapneyoko|shitapneyoko]] || [[word:kitapneyoko|kitapneyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutapneyoko|thuthutapneyoko]] || [[word:jujutapneyoko|jujutapneyoko]] || [[word:shushutapneyoko|shushutapneyoko]] || [[word:kukutapneyoko|kukutapneyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutapneyoko|thutapneyoko]] || [[word:jutapneyoko|jutapneyoko]] || [[word:shutapneyoko|shutapneyoko]] || [[word:kutapneyoko|kutapneyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutapneyoko|thutapneyoko]] || [[word:jutapneyoko|jutapneyoko]] || [[word:shutapneyoko|shutapneyoko]] || [[word:kutapneyoko|kutapneyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetapneyoko|thetapneyoko]] || [[word:jetapneyoko|jetapneyoko]] || [[word:shetapneyoko|shetapneyoko]] || [[word:ketapneyoko|ketapneyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotapneyoko|thothotapneyoko]] || [[word:jojotapneyoko|jojotapneyoko]] || [[word:shoshotapneyoko|shoshotapneyoko]] || [[word:kokotapneyoko|kokotapneyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotapneyoko|thotapneyoko]] || [[word:jotapneyoko|jotapneyoko]] || [[word:shotapneyoko|shotapneyoko]] || [[word:kotapneyoko|kotapneyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotapneyoko|thotapneyoko]] || [[word:jotapneyoko|jotapneyoko]] || [[word:shotapneyoko|shotapneyoko]] || [[word:kotapneyoko|kotapneyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtapneyoko|thĂŠtapneyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtapneyoko|jĂŠtapneyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtapneyoko|shĂŠtapneyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtapneyoko|kĂŠtapneyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatapneyoko|thathatapneyoko]] || [[word:jajatapneyoko|jajatapneyoko]] || [[word:shashatapneyoko|shashatapneyoko]] || [[word:kakatapneyoko|kakatapneyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatapneyoko|thatapneyoko]] || [[word:jatapneyoko|jatapneyoko]] || [[word:shatapneyoko|shatapneyoko]] || [[word:katapneyoko|katapneyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatapneyoko|thatapneyoko]] || [[word:jatapneyoko|jatapneyoko]] || [[word:shatapneyoko|shatapneyoko]] || [[word:katapneyoko|katapneyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
